havingProblems.description: Heading of the page when we’re unable to log the user in due to a technical problem.

cannotLogYouIn.message: Sorry, we can’t log you in
cannotLogYouIn.description: Heading of the page when the user has denied PREreview access to their details on ORCID.

unableToLogYouIn.message: We’re unable to log you in right now.
unableToLogYouIn.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.

youDeniedAccess.message: You have denied PREreview access to your ORCID iD.
youDeniedAccess.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we can’t log you in” when the user has denied PREreview access to their details on ORCID.

tryAgainLater.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.

tryAgain.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we can’t log you in”.
